title: Unibond Sealant Finishing Tool, Effective Smoother for a Smooth & Professional Finish, Multi-Purpose Silicone Sealant Tool for Wall & Floor Applications
features: Effective smoothing - The silicone smoothing tool is suitable for all types of sealant, with the option of different finishing angles for wall & floor applications.
Professional finish - The caulking tool is fast and effective to use for smoothing sealant, allowing you to achieve the perfect finish without the need for masking tape.
Easy to clean - The practical silicone finishing tool is very easy to clean. Detailed instructions for use and further processing instructions are included.
Space-saving - The handy sealant smoothing tool is packed into a resealable storage box, where the smoothing tool can be stored to save space after use.
Practical delivery - Unibond Sealant Finishing Tool, silicone sealant tool for smoothing seals with a professional finish, fast & effective, less sealant waste, 1 x Sealant Finishing Tool
description: From the manufacturer About UniBond In the UK, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products - Construction Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job for both inside and outside the house. UniBond Sealant Finishing Tool Finishing sealant made easy! The Sealant Finishing Tool is suitable for all types of sealant, giving you the option of different angles on walls and floors for different breadths of finish, depending on the bead size. Give your silicone profiling a professional finish with this hand tool from UniBond! Once you try this practical finishing tool, you'll wonder how you completed any sealant profiling jobs without it! Simple and easy to use Long lasting and durable Designed not to damage surfaces Professional results for any sealant finishing situation Easy to clean Format: 1x Device How to smooth and shape a sealant Step 1: Wear protective gloves and make sure the area is well-ventilated. Step 2: Apply sealant to the desired area taking care not to apply too much. Step 3: Select the desired profile on the Sealant Finishing Tool with the slope of the angled surface facing towards the direction of travel. Step 4: Place the tool on the beginning of the sealant bead. Step 5: Press down firmly and move the tool at a steady speed over the bead to achieve a professional finish. Some sealants may require the use of a smoothing agent, please read the manufacturers instructions. Remove excess immediately from the tool with a dry cloth. Professional results every time! It doesn't get much simpler than this silicone sealant finishing tool! With its multiple profiles, the job of profiling or smoothing sealant to leave a professional-looking finish is done easily and quickly with no fuss. Suitable for use with all types of sealant For removing existing sealant from a variety of surfaces, as well as smoothing during application Ideal for use in the bathroom or kitchen and dries within 60 minutes For easily renewing bath, sink and kitchen sealant For quickly removing sealant indoors & outdoors Characteristics Reduces waste and provides a professional-looking finish With 2-in-1 functionality. Does not damage surfaces or tiles Refresh discoloured/faded grout joints. Easy to apply, with triple mould protection An innovative formula that refreshes old silicone. Simply apply on top of existing sealant A high strength silicone remover. Fast & effective, easy to use
